<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Pest\PendingCalls\Concerns; /** * @internal */ trait Describable { /** * Note: this is property is not used; however, it gets added automatically by rector php. * * @var array<int, \Pest\Support\Description> */ public array $__describing; /** * The describing of the test case. * * @var array<int, \Pest\Support\Description> */ public array $describing = []; }
